title: EPD LCA study
description: Phase 3 LCA study: methodology and representativeness (section 3)

section_title.description: Main heading of the LCA study section when present

standards_and_methodology.description: Normative basis, EN 15804 / ISO 14040-44 references, calculation rules

pcr_reference.description: Product Category Rules reference as stated in the LCA study section

lca_software_and_database.description: LCA software, background database, and version when stated

goal_and_scope.description: Goal and scope of the LCA study

functional_unit.description: Functional / declared unit as described in the LCA study

system_boundaries.description: System boundary description and included life-cycle modules

impact_assessment.description: LCIA method, impact categories, characterisation factors

interpretation.description: Interpretation of LCA results when present in this section

additional_paragraphs.description: Other substantive paragraphs not covered by the fields above

subsections.description: Granular LCA study blocks (e.g. 3.1–3.14) when the EPD splits section 3 into subsections

content.description: Full text for that subsection, verbatim
